# Corona Verification Evidence Dossier

Every Tier-1 decoder is validated by **five independent evidence layers**. This file is generated from the test suite and checked for freshness in CI (`test/test_verification_matrix_fresh.py`).

## Evidence layers

1. **Exhaustive sweep** -- every one of the 2^width input codes is decoded and compared (cocotb + iverilog).
2. **Independent reference** -- a spec-derived decoder written separately from the RTL (Loops 86-90), so a shared bug cannot hide.
3. **Formal harness** -- `formal/fv_<name>.sv` checks decoder == golden over ALL inputs via `anyconst` + SMT; the golden is cross-checked to the independent reference (Loops 98-99).
4. **Post-silicon vector** -- the RP2350 bring-up oracle's expected values, cross-checked to the independent reference (Loops 92-94).
5. **Mutation kill** -- a fault injected into the decoder is detected by its reference (Loops 96-97), so the check is non-vacuous.

## Per-decoder matrix

| Decoder | bits | codes | Reference source | Indep ref | Formal | Post-Si | Mut |
| --- | ---: | ---: | --- | :-: | --- | :-: | :-: |
| bcd | 8 | 256 | packed BCD 10*tens+ones | yes | computed | yes | yes |
| bf16 | 16 | 65536 | IEEE bf16 (bits<<16) | yes | definitional | yes | yes |
| bitnet | 2 | 4 | BitNet b1.58 ternary (arXiv:2402.17764) | yes | computed | yes | yes |
| e8m0 | 8 | 256 | OCP MX scale 2^(e-127) | yes | computed | yes | yes |
| fp4 | 4 | 16 | OCP MX E2M1 (computed) | yes | LUT | yes | yes |
| fp6_e2m3 | 6 | 64 | OCP MXFP6 E2M3 | yes | computed | yes | yes |
| fp6_e3m2 | 6 | 64 | OCP MXFP6 E3M2 | yes | computed | yes | yes |
| fp8_e4m3_fnuz | 8 | 256 | AMD/Graphcore E4M3FNUZ | yes | computed | yes | yes |
| fp8_e5m2 | 8 | 256 | OCP OFP8 E5M2 (arXiv:2209.05433) | yes | computed | yes | yes |
| int4 | 4 | 16 | two's complement | yes | computed | yes | yes |
| int8 | 8 | 256 | two's complement | yes | computed | yes | yes |
| lns8 | 8 | 256 | antilog round(256*2^(i/16)) | yes | LUT | yes | yes |
| mxfp8_e4m3 | 8 | 256 | OCP E4M3 (no Inf, 2 NaN) | yes | computed | yes | yes |
| mxint8 | 8 | 256 | OCP MX int * 2^-6 | yes | computed | yes | yes |
| nf4 | 4 | 16 | QLoRA NF4 quantiles (arXiv:2305.14314) | yes | LUT | yes | yes |
| posit8 | 8 | 256 | Posit Standard 2022 + johndcook table | yes | LUT | yes | yes |
| tf32 | 19 | 524288 | NVIDIA TF32 field repack | yes | definitional | yes | yes |

## Summary

- Decoders: **17** (each with all 5 evidence layers)
- Independent references: **17/17**
- Formal harnesses: **17/17** (LUT/computed/definitional goldens, all cross-checked to refs)
- Post-silicon vector coverage: **17/17** on-die decoders
- Mutation-killed decoders: **17/17**
- Total input codes exhaustively decoded across all decoders: **592,308**
